concerns.text: Task T020 (stratified sampling) is placed in Phase 4 (US2) but is a prerequisite for T018 (run_appo_rollout) which consumes the sampled tasks. T020 must precede T018 to satisfy producer-consumer ordering within the same user story.

Task T026 (align_scores) is listed before T027 (correlation calculation) in Phase 5, but T027 depends on the output of T026. While the order is correct, T026 is marked [P] (parallel-safe). Alignment requires the *output* of both US1 (T014) and US2 (T021). If T026 runs in parallel with US1/US2 implementation, it will fail. The [P] tag is invalid here as it depends on external artifacts not yet produced in the parallel stream.

Task T030 (reasoning pattern classifier) is marked [P] but depends on the 'Residual Analysis' data generated by T029 (LMM) and T031 (Report generation logic). The classifier needs the residuals to categorize. T030 cannot run in parallel with T029/T031; it must follow them. The [P] tag is incorrect.

Task T008 creates 'base schema definitions' in contracts/. T011 (US1 test) and T016 (US2 test) depend on 'contracts/output_schema.yaml'. T008 must be explicitly completed before T011/T016 can be written or run. The current grouping implies T008 is foundational, but the dependency on the specific file path in tests should be explicit in the task description or ordering.
